revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Japanese Imperial Family | class = collapsible collapsed | titlestyle = font-size:88%; line-height:150%; background:lavender; | title =
{{resize|150%|[[Imperial House of Japan|Japanese imperial family]]}}
| image = [[File:Imperial Seal of Japan.svg|80px]] | contentstyle = text-align:left; border-top:1px #aaa solid; | content1 = '''[[Naruhito|The Emperor]]'''
[[Empress Masako|The Empress]] *[[Aiko, Princess Toshi|The Princess Toshi]] | content2 = [[Akihito|The Emperor Emeritus]]
[[Empress Michiko|The Empress Emerita]] *[[Fumihito, Crown Prince of Japan|The Crown Prince Akishino]]
[[Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|The Crown Princess Akishino]] **[[Princess Kako of Akishino]] **[[Prince Hisahito of Akishino]] | content3 = * [[Masahito, Prince Hitachi|The Prince Hitachi]]
[[Hanako, Princess Hitachi|The Princess Hitachi]] | content4 = *[[Princess Tomohito of Mikasa]] **[[Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] **[[Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] *[[Hisako, Princess Takamado|The Princess Takamado]] **[[Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] }} The only people who should be listed in this template – to the exclusion of all others – are the Emperor and his consort, the Empress, his grandmother, the Grand Empress Dowager, and his mother, the Empress Dowager, as well as all the Princes and Princesses of Japan. The people listed should all be alive. (An exception should be held for the Emperor's abdicated father, the Emperor Emeritus, and his abdicated mother, the Empress Emerita, while they are still alive.) [[Category:Asian royal family templates|Japanese]] [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Imperial Family]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Japanese Imperial Family | class = collapsible collapsed | titlestyle = font-size:88%; line-height:150%; background:lavender; | title =
{{resize|150%|[[Imperial House of Japan|Japanese imperial family]]}}
| image = [[File:Imperial Seal of Japan.svg|80px]] | contentstyle = text-align:left; border-top:1px #aaa solid; | content1 = '''[[Naruhito|The Emperor]]'''
[[Empress Masako|The Empress]] *[[Aiko, Princess Toshi|The Princess Toshi]] | content2 = [[Akihito|The Emperor Emeritus]]
[[Empress Michiko|The Empress Emerita]] *[[Fumihito, Crown Prince of Japan|The Crown Prince Akishino]]
[[Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|The Crown Princess Akishino]] **[[Princess Kako of Akishino]] **[[Prince Hisahito of Akishino]] | content3 = * [[Masahito, Prince Hitachi|The Prince Hitachi]]
[[Hanako, Princess Hitachi|The Princess Hitachi]] | content4 = *[[Princess Tomohito of Mikasa]] **[[Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] **[[Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] *[[Hisako, Princess Takamado|The Princess Takamado]] **[[Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] }} The only people who should be listed in this template – to the exclusion of all others – are the Emperor and his consort, the Empress, his grandmother, the Grand Empress Dowager, and his mother, the Empress Dowager, as well as all the Princes and Princesses of Japan. The people listed should all be alive. (An exception should be held for the Emperor's abdicated father, the Emperor Emeritus, and his abdicated mother, the Empress Emerita, while they are still alive.) [[Category:Asian royal family templates|Japanese]] [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Imperial Family]]

revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Japanese Imperial Family | class = collapsible collapsed | titlestyle = font-size:88%; line-height:150%; background:lavender; | title =
{{resize|150%|[[Imperial House of Japan|Japanese imperial family]]}}
| image = [[File:Imperial Seal of Japan.svg|80px]] | contentstyle = text-align:left; border-top:1px #aaa solid; | content1 = '''[[Naruhito|The Emperor]]'''
[[Empress Masako|The Empress]] *[[:en:Aiko, Princess Toshi|The Princess Toshi]] | content2 = [[Akihito|The Emperor Emeritus]]
[[Empress Michiko|The Empress Emerita]] *[[Fumihito, Crown Prince of Japan|The Crown Prince Akishino]]
[[Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|The Crown Princess Akishino]] **[[Princess Kako of Akishino]] **[[Prince Hisahito of Akishino]] | content3 = * [[Masahito, Prince Hitachi|The Prince Hitachi]]
[[Hanako, Princess Hitachi|The Princess Hitachi]] | content4 = *[[Princess Tomohito of Mikasa]] **[[Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] **[[Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] *[[Hisako, Princess Takamado|The Princess Takamado]] **[[Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] }} The only people who should be listed in this template – to the exclusion of all others – are the Emperor and his consort, the Empress, his grandmother, the Grand Empress Dowager, and his mother, the Empress Dowager, as well as all the Princes and Princesses of Japan. The people listed should all be alive. (An exception should be held for the Emperor's abdicated father, the Emperor Emeritus, and his abdicated mother, the Empress Emerita, while they are still alive.) [[Category:Asian royal family templates|Japanese]] [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Imperial Family]]

{{sidebar | name = Japanese Imperial Family | class = collapsible collapsed | titlestyle = font-size:88%; line-height:150%; background:lavender; | title =

[[Empress Masako|The Empress]] *[[:en:Aiko, Princess Toshi|The Princess Toshi]] | content2 = [[:en:Akihito|The Emperor Emeritus]]
[[Empress Michiko|The Empress Emerita]] *[[Fumihito, Crown Prince of Japan|The Crown Prince Akishino]]
[[Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|The Crown Princess Akishino]] **[[Princess Kako of Akishino]] **[[Prince Hisahito of Akishino]] | content3 = * [[Masahito, Prince Hitachi|The Prince Hitachi]]
[[Hanako, Princess Hitachi|The Princess Hitachi]] | content4 = *[[Princess Tomohito of Mikasa]] **[[Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] **[[Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] *[[Hisako, Princess Takamado|The Princess Takamado]] **[[Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] }} The only people who should be listed in this template – to the exclusion of all others – are the Emperor and his consort, the Empress, his grandmother, the Grand Empress Dowager, and his mother, the Empress Dowager, as well as all the Princes and Princesses of Japan. The people listed should all be alive. (An exception should be held for the Emperor's abdicated father, the Emperor Emeritus, and his abdicated mother, the Empress Emerita, while they are still alive.) [[:en:Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|The Crown Princess Akishino]] **[[:en:Princess Kako of Akishino|Princess Kako of Akishino]] **[[:en:Prince Hisahito of Akishino|Prince Hisahito of Akishino]] | content3 = * [[:en:Masahito, Prince Hitachi|The Prince Hitachi]]
[[:en:Hanako, Princess Hitachi|The Princess Hitachi]] | content4 = *[[:en:Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Princess Tomohito of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Akiko of Mikasa|Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] **[[Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] *[[:en:Hisako, Princess Takamado|The Princess Takamado]] **[[Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] }} The only people who should be listed in this template – to the exclusion of all others – are the Emperor and his consort, the Empress, his grandmother, the Grand Empress Dowager, and his mother, the Empress Dowager, as well as all the Princes and Princesses of Japan. The people listed should all be alive. (An exception should be held for the Emperor's abdicated father, the Emperor Emeritus, and his abdicated mother, the Empress Emerita, while they are still alive.) [[Category:Asian royal family templates|Japanese]] [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Imperial Family]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Japanese Imperial Family | class = collapsible collapsed | titlestyle = font-size:88%; line-height:150%; background:lavender; | title =
{{resize|150%|[[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Japanese imperial family]]}}
| image = [[File:Imperial Seal of Japan.svg|80px]] | contentstyle = text-align:left; border-top:1px #aaa solid; | content1 = '''[[:en:Naruhito|The Emperor]]'''
[[Empress Masako|The Empress]] *[[:en:Aiko, Princess Toshi|The Princess Toshi]] | content2 = [[:en:Akihito|The Emperor Emeritus]]
[[:en:Empress Michiko|The Empress Emerita]] *[[:en:Fumihito, Crown Prince of Japan|The Crown Prince Akishino]]
[[:en:Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|The Crown Princess Akishino]] **[[:en:Princess Kako of Akishino|Princess Kako of Akishino]] **[[:en:Prince Hisahito of Akishino|Prince Hisahito of Akishino]] | content3 = * [[:en:Masahito, Prince Hitachi|The Prince Hitachi]]
[[:en:Hanako, Princess Hitachi|The Princess Hitachi]] | content4 = *[[:en:Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Princess Tomohito of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Akiko of Mikasa|Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] **[[Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] *[[:en:Hisako, Princess Takamado|The Princess Takamado]] **[[:en:Princess Tsuguko of Takamado|Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] }} The only people who should be listed in this template – to the exclusion of all others – are the Emperor and his consort, the Empress, his grandmother, the Grand Empress Dowager, and his mother, the Empress Dowager, as well as all the Princes and Princesses of Japan. The people listed should all be alive. (An exception should be held for the Emperor's abdicated father, the Emperor Emeritus, and his abdicated mother, the Empress Emerita, while they are still alive.) [[Category:Asian royal family templates|Japanese]] [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Imperial Family]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Japanese Imperial Family | class = collapsible collapsed | titlestyle = font-size:88%; line-height:150%; background:lavender; | title =
{{resize|150%|[[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Japanese imperial family]]}}
| image = [[File:Imperial Seal of Japan.svg|80px]] | contentstyle = text-align:left; border-top:1px #aaa solid; | content1 = '''[[:en:Naruhito|The Emperor]]'''
[[Empress Masako|The Empress]] *[[:en:Aiko, Princess Toshi|The Princess Toshi]] | content2 = [[:en:Akihito|The Emperor Emeritus]]
[[:en:Empress Michiko|The Empress Emerita]] *[[:en:Fumihito, Crown Prince of Japan|The Crown Prince Akishino]]
[[:en:Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|The Crown Princess Akishino]] **[[:en:Princess Kako of Akishino|Princess Kako of Akishino]] **[[:en:Prince Hisahito of Akishino|Prince Hisahito of Akishino]] | content3 = * [[:en:Masahito, Prince Hitachi|The Prince Hitachi]]
[[:en:Hanako, Princess Hitachi|The Princess Hitachi]] | content4 = *[[:en:Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Princess Tomohito of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Akiko of Mikasa|Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Yōko of Mikasa|Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] *[[:en:Hisako, Princess Takamado|The Princess Takamado]] **[[:en:Princess Tsuguko of Takamado|Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] }} The only people who should be listed in this template – to the exclusion of all others – are the Emperor and his consort, the Empress, his grandmother, the Grand Empress Dowager, and his mother, the Empress Dowager, as well as all the Princes and Princesses of Japan. The people listed should all be alive. (An exception should be held for the Emperor's abdicated father, the Emperor Emeritus, and his abdicated mother, the Empress Emerita, while they are still alive.) [[Category:Asian royal family templates|Japanese]] [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Imperial Family]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Japanese Imperial Family | class = collapsible collapsed | titlestyle = font-size:88%; line-height:150%; background:lavender; | title =
{{resize|150%|[[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Japanese imperial family]]}}
| image = [[File:Imperial Seal of Japan.svg|80px]] | contentstyle = text-align:left; border-top:1px #aaa solid; | content1 = '''[[:en:Naruhito|The Emperor]]'''
[[Empress Masako|The Empress]] *[[:en:Aiko, Princess Toshi|The Princess Toshi]] | content2 = [[:en:Akihito|The Emperor Emeritus]]
[[:en:Empress Michiko|The Empress Emerita]] *[[:en:Fumihito, Crown Prince of Japan|The Crown Prince Akishino]]
[[:en:Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|The Crown Princess Akishino]] **[[:en:Princess Kako of Akishino|Princess Kako of Akishino]] **[[:en:Prince Hisahito of Akishino|Prince Hisahito of Akishino]] | content3 = * [[:en:Masahito, Prince Hitachi|The Prince Hitachi]]
[[:en:Hanako, Princess Hitachi|The Princess Hitachi]] | content4 = *[[:en:Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Princess Tomohito of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Akiko of Mikasa|Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Yōko of Mikasa|Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] *[[:en:Hisako, Princess Takamado|The Princess Takamado]] **[[:en:Princess Tsuguko of Takamado|Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] }} The only people who should be listed in this template – to the exclusion of all others – are the Emperor and his consort, the Empress, his grandmother, the Grand Empress Dowager, and his mother, the Empress Dowager, as well as all the Princes and Princesses of Japan. The people listed should all be alive. (An exception should be held for the Emperor's abdicated father, the Emperor Emeritus, and his abdicated mother, the Empress Emerita, while they are still alive.) [[Category:Asian royal family templates|Japanese]] [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Imperial Family]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Japanese Imperial Family | class = collapsible collapsed | titlestyle = font-size:88%; line-height:150%; background:lavender; | title =
{{resize|150%|[[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Japanese imperial family]]}}
| image = [[File:Imperial Seal of Japan.svg|80px]] | contentstyle = text-align:left; border-top:1px #aaa solid; | content1 = '''[[:en:Naruhito|The Emperor]]'''
[[Empress Masako|The Empress]] *[[:en:Aiko, Princess Toshi|The Princess Toshi]] | content2 = [[:en:Akihito|The Emperor Emeritus]]
[[:en:Empress Michiko|The Empress Emerita]] *[[:en:Fumihito, Crown Prince of Japan|The Crown Prince Akishino]]
[[:en:Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|The Crown Princess Akishino]] **[[:en:Princess Kako of Akishino|Princess Kako of Akishino]] **[[:en:Prince Hisahito of Akishino|Prince Hisahito of Akishino]] | content3 = * [[:en:Masahito, Prince Hitachi|The Prince Hitachi]]
[[:en:Hanako, Princess Hitachi|The Princess Hitachi]] | content4 = *[[:en:Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Princess Tomohito of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Akiko of Mikasa|Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Yōko of Mikasa|Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] *[[:en:Hisako, Princess Takamado|The Princess Takamado]] **[[:en:Princess Tsuguko of Takamado|Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] }} The only people who should be listed in this template – to the exclusion of all others – are the Emperor and his consort, the Empress, his grandmother, the Grand Empress Dowager, and his mother, the Empress Dowager, as well as all the Princes and Princesses of Japan. The people listed should all be alive. (An exception should be held for the Emperor's abdicated father, the Emperor Emeritus, and his abdicated mother, the Empress Emerita, while they are still alive.) [[Category:Asian royal family templates|Japanese]] [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Imperial Family]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Japanese Imperial Family | class = collapsible collapsed | titlestyle = font-size:88%; line-height:150%; background:lavender; | title =
{{resize|150%|[[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Japanese imperial family]]}}
| image = [[File:Imperial Seal of Japan.svg|80px]] | contentstyle = text-align:left; border-top:1px #aaa solid; | content1 = '''[[:en:Naruhito|The Emperor]]'''
[[Empress Masako|The Empress]] *[[:en:Aiko, Princess Toshi|The Princess Toshi]] | content2 = [[:en:Akihito|The Emperor Emeritus]]
[[:en:Empress Michiko|The Empress Emerita]] *[[:en:Fumihito, Crown Prince of Japan|The Crown Prince Akishino]]
[[:en:Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|The Crown Princess Akishino]] **[[:en:Princess Kako of Akishino|Princess Kako of Akishino]] **[[:en:Prince Hisahito of Akishino|Prince Hisahito of Akishino]] | content3 = * [[:en:Masahito, Prince Hitachi|The Prince Hitachi]]
[[:en:Hanako, Princess Hitachi|The Princess Hitachi]] | content4 = *[[:en:Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Princess Tomohito of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Akiko of Mikasa|Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Yōko of Mikasa|Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] *[[:en:Hisako, Princess Takamado|The Princess Takamado]] **[[:en:Princess Tsuguko of Takamado|Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] }} The only people who should be listed in this template – to the exclusion of all others – are the Emperor and his consort, the Empress, his grandmother, the Grand Empress Dowager, and his mother, the Empress Dowager, as well as all the Princes and Princesses of Japan. The people listed should all be alive. (An exception should be held for the Emperor's abdicated father, the Emperor Emeritus, and his abdicated mother, the Empress Emerita, while they are still alive.) [[Category:Asian royal family templates|Japanese]] [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Imperial Family]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Japanese Imperial Family | class = collapsible collapsed | titlestyle = font-size:88%; line-height:150%; background:lavender; | title =
{{resize|150%|[[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Japanese imperial family]]}}
| image = [[File:Imperial Seal of Japan.svg|80px]] | contentstyle = text-align:left; border-top:1px #aaa solid; | content1 = '''[[:en:Naruhito|The Emperor]]'''
[[Empress Masako|The Empress]] *[[:en:Aiko, Princess Toshi|The Princess Toshi]] | content2 = [[:en:Akihito|The Emperor Emeritus]]
[[:en:Empress Michiko|The Empress Emerita]] *[[:en:Fumihito, Crown Prince of Japan|The Crown Prince Akishino]]
[[:en:Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|The Crown Princess Akishino]] **[[:en:Princess Kako of Akishino|Princess Kako of Akishino]] **[[:en:Prince Hisahito of Akishino|Prince Hisahito of Akishino]] | content3 = * [[:en:Masahito, Prince Hitachi|The Prince Hitachi]]
[[:en:Hanako, Princess Hitachi|The Princess Hitachi]] | content4 = *[[:en:Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Princess Tomohito of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Akiko of Mikasa|Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Yōko of Mikasa|Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] *[[:en:Hisako, Princess Takamado|The Princess Takamado]] **[[:en:Princess Tsuguko of Takamado|Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] }} The only people who should be listed in this template – to the exclusion of all others – are the Emperor and his consort, the Empress, his grandmother, the Grand Empress Dowager, and his mother, the Empress Dowager, as well as all the Princes and Princesses of Japan. The people listed should all be alive. (An exception should be held for the Emperor's abdicated father, the Emperor Emeritus, and his abdicated mother, the Empress Emerita, while they are still alive.) [[Category:Asian royal family templates|Japanese]] [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Imperial Family]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Japanese Imperial Family | class = collapsible collapsed | titlestyle = font-size:88%; line-height:150%; background:lavender; | title =
{{resize|150%|[[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Japanese imperial family]]}}
| image = [[File:Imperial Seal of Japan.svg|80px]] | contentstyle = text-align:left; border-top:1px #aaa solid; | content1 = '''[[:en:Naruhito|The Emperor]]'''
[[Empress Masako|The Empress]] *[[:en:Aiko, Princess Toshi|The Princess Toshi]] | content2 = [[:en:Akihito|The Emperor Emeritus]]
[[:en:Empress Michiko|The Empress Emerita]] *[[:en:Fumihito, Crown Prince of Japan|The Crown Prince Akishino]]
[[:en:Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|The Crown Princess Akishino]] **[[:en:Princess Kako of Akishino|Princess Kako of Akishino]] **[[:en:Prince Hisahito of Akishino|Prince Hisahito of Akishino]] | content3 = * [[:en:Masahito, Prince Hitachi|The Prince Hitachi]]
[[:en:Hanako, Princess Hitachi|The Princess Hitachi]] | content4 = *[[:en:Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Princess Tomohito of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Akiko of Mikasa|Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] **[[:en:Princess Yōko of Mikasa|Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] *[[:en:Hisako, Princess Takamado|The Princess Takamado]] **[[:en:Princess Tsuguko of Takamado|Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] }} The only people who should be listed in this template – to the exclusion of all others – are the Emperor and his consort, the Empress, his grandmother, the Grand Empress Dowager, and his mother, the Empress Dowager, as well as all the Princes and Princesses of Japan. The people listed should all be alive. (An exception should be held for the Emperor's abdicated father, the Emperor Emeritus, and his abdicated mother, the Empress Emerita, while they are still alive.) [[Category:Asian royal family templates|Japanese]] [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Imperial Family]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
